## Validation Checklist

- [ ] Linked to a GitHub Issue
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Type-check passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] No vendor SDK imports outside seam directories
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated (if this PR introduces a new pattern in a directory)
- [ ] ADR written (if this PR deviates from the locked stack or conventions)
